name: KAMAITACHI

abilities.name: Demise (To the Sky)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, an ally within 6" may place anywhere within 4" of itself.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

actions.name: Dust Devil
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models and receives +1 (soulstone) to its Skl if the target is at a lower elevation.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4", ignoring vertical distance.

triggers.name: Gateway to the Beyond
triggers.text: Ally only. Make a Rift marker within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Rejuvenate Oni
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. If the target is within 1" of a Rift marker, this action receives a (fortitude).

extraction_notes: STN: 8 appears below the artwork, likely a Soulstone number or reference code
Health bar shows numbers 0-7, confirming 7 health total
